evidence: "What can I say? Miss Marple always uses her uncanny instinct and mature thought processes to dumbfound most of the detective inspectors and policemen she encounters."
"Entertaining as only Morse can be. Worth many reruns"
"Whenever everyday tv drivel gets me down, I reach for this delightful series."
"Interesting story lines; Excellent acting by all major characters; I'm not sure I like the excessive fawning over Harriet Vane by Lord Peter..."
"What a collection of thoroughly entertaining stories. Excellent acting by all actors, all familiar faces of British productions."
"Superb actors! The actors In this film are masterful in their individual roles and the storyline is so intense it gives me a headache every time after watching it, but it is routinely rewatched."
"Excellent quality video. Having seen Joan Hickson's portrayal, she is my favorite."
"The film quality and audio vary from episode to episode but hey, they're old films."
"If you have never seen Joan Hickson as Miss Marple you have really missed a perfect portrayal."
"As always, fascinating storylines; no disappointment here."
"This is truly the 'birds eye view'; an amazing film with some incredible people involved to make this stunning film."
"This is one of those movies that one can watch over and over. Fantastic storyline with superb acting."
"What can I say? Miss Marple always uses her uncanny instinct and mature thought processes to dumbfound most of the detective inspectors and policemen she encounters."

summary: The user has a strong preference for mystery and drama genres, particularly enjoying slow-paced narratives with high production quality. They appreciate emotional depth and character-driven stories, often favoring familiar actors and series.
